judge_reason: Description B adds specific quoted labels ('60 ft', '10 ft', 'Rear View', 'INCL 2', 'RESTRICTED') and a 'slightly curved profile' that are not present in Description A, creating a contradiction on the presence and content of textual elements within the sketch.
original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch of an elongated, cylindrical or cigar-shaped object. The object tapers slightly from a wider front to a narrower rear.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Hand-drawn sketch of a long tapered side-view shape labeled “60 ft” in length and “10 ft” in height, with a smaller oval “Rear View” labeled “10 ft” below; “RESTRICTED” stamped at top and bottom and “incl 2” handwritten at lower left.*
